shortcuts.name: Install MedCut
shortcuts.purpose: Installs or updates MedCut in Scriptable and then points the user at the official shortcut pack.

shortcuts.name: Open Dashboard
shortcuts.purpose: Opens the MedCut dashboard directly in Scriptable.

shortcuts.name: Quick Log
shortcuts.purpose: Logs one entry and returns to the updated dashboard.

shortcuts.name: Add Schedule
shortcuts.purpose: Creates a recurring schedule and returns to the updated dashboard.
